  "Pharmacy": ["Pharmaceutics", "Pharmacy Practice", "Pharmacology", "Pharmaceutical Analysis", "Pharmacognosy", "Pharmaceutical Quality Assurance", "Pharmaceutical Regulatory Affairs"],
  "Nursing": ["Medical-Surgical Nursing", "Child Health (Paediatric) Nursing", "Obstetrics and Gynecological Nursing", "Community Health Nursing", "Mental Health (Psychiatric) Nursing"],
